---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for ClawLens
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve.

**Example:** "I'm always frustrated when I can't see X because..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Example:** "Add a new analytics query that shows..."

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or features have you considered?

**Example:** "I considered using X tool, but it doesn't work because..."

## Use Case

Describe your specific use case and how this feature would help.

- Who would benefit from this feature? (solo developers, teams, power users, etc.)
- What workflow does this enable or improve?
- How critical is this feature to your use of ClawLens?

## Priority

- [ ] Critical - blocks my use of ClawLens
- [ ] High - significantly improves my workflow
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor improvement

## Proposed Implementation (optional)

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here:

- Would this be a new API endpoint, UI page, analytics query?
- Would it require database schema changes?
- Are there any technical challenges to consider?

## Examples

If applicable, provide examples of how this feature works in other tools or mockups:

- Link to similar features in other observability tools
- Screenshots or wireframes of desired UI
- Example API responses or query results

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or links about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered alternatives
- [ ] I have described the use case and priority
